description.content:
There are multiple notions of entropy in the LE (mean entropy of the individual delegation vectors, entropy of the classifications etc., measure multiple of them)

Also there are multiple notions of what it means to be a "difficult sample" I would train MLP with N different seeds and see which one it gets consistently wrong.
